# Avihu Sitton — Psychotherapist

Avihu Sitton is a certified psychotherapist based in Ramat Negev, Israel (Retamim 17, 8555000).
He specializes in emotional therapy, couples counseling using the "Derech" methodology, and group facilitation.
He works with individuals experiencing emotional distress, relationship difficulties, and trauma.
He also specializes in supporting military reservists reintegrating into civilian life, and recently appeared on TV discussing his work leading workshops for reservists returning to routine through WIZO.

Services:
- Individual emotional therapy
- Couples counseling ("Derech" method) — building emotional independence and conflict management
- Couples groups — 5 to 10 experiential sessions
- Workshops for military reservists — reintegration, practical tools, psychological support

Contact:
- Website: https://avihusitton.com
- Phone: +972-53-285-3235
- Email: therapy@avihusitton.com
- Location: Retamim 17, Ramat Negev, Israel (31.053657999291975, 34.690296501868055)
